title: Launch Your Football Coaching Career Developmental Coaching Program | Ministry of Football Singapore
description:
Football & Soccer Coach Trial (no experience needed!)

Launch Your Football Coaching Career Developmental Coaching Program | Ministry of Football Singapore

Join Singapore's Dynamic Football Landscape!

About the Role: We're seeking passionate football coaches to join our development program at Ministry of Football (MOF). This internship opportunity offers hands-on experience in both the commercial and educational aspects of Singapore's football scene.

What You'll Do:

  • Work alongside qualified coaches in our MOF Academy
  • Train young footballers aged 5-14 years
  • Learn about Singapore's football ecosystem
  • Contribute to our students' football development journey

Why MOF?

  • Structured learning environment
  • Hands-on coaching experience
  • Opportunity to shape young talents
  • Be part of Singapore's growing football community

Application Process: Email the following to hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg

  1. Your resume
  2. Cover letter

Important: Applications will only be considered when submitted via email with both required documents.

Connect With Us:

Website: ministryoffootball.com.sg

Facebook: mof.com.sg

Instagram: @ministryoffootball



Take the first step in your coaching career with MOF. Join us in nurturing Singapore's next generation of footballers!

postedCompany.description:
MOF IS SINGAPORE’S TOP 11-A-SIDE FOOTBALL LEAGUES, CUPS & COMPETITIONS ORGANIZER!

Well-organized and co-ordinated: no venue mix-ups or miscommunication
Deliver what we promise: weekly games are weekly games, no gaps (save for postponements)
Easily reachable and responsive hotlines
Professional and clear in our communication
Well-covered by photographers to highlight your football journey
Prepares for contingencies, such as standby referees etc. 
Fast & efficient in dealing with problems
Happy to hear feedback with humility
Firm in the enforcement of rules & regulations (afterall football is a sport), but fair in making judgments
